parameters.query:
INSERT INTO events (conversation_id, type, detail)
VALUES (NULL, 'lead_notified', jsonb_build_object('lead_id', $1::text))
ON CONFLICT ((detail ->> 'lead_id')) WHERE type = 'lead_notified'
DO NOTHING
RETURNING id

SELECT pl.id AS lead_id, pl.name, pl.email, pl.company, pl.message, pl.source,
       COALESCE((SELECT count(*) FROM tenants t WHERE t.owner_user_id = pl.user_id), 0) AS workspaces_used
  FROM premium_leads pl
 WHERE pl.id = $1

INSERT INTO events (conversation_id, type, detail)
VALUES (NULL, 'workflow_error', jsonb_build_object('webhook', 'premium-lead', 'node', 'Slack Notify', 'lead_id', $1::text, 'message', $2::text))

INSERT INTO events (conversation_id, type, detail)
VALUES (NULL, 'workflow_error', jsonb_build_object('webhook', 'premium-lead', 'node', 'Gmail Notify', 'lead_id', $1::text, 'message', $2::text))
